description: Create a SQL View named 'vue_adresse_parsed' in the DrTuxTest database that joins the 'IndexNomPrenom' and 'fchpat' tables on the patient GUID. The view must include the columns 'guid' (from FchGnrl_IDDos), 'nom_complet' (concatenation of UPPERCASE last name and first name separated by a space), 'adresse_brute' (original FchPat_Adresse), 'num_voie' (leading digits of the address), and 'nom_voie' (the remaining address text, trimmed). Export the first 20 rows of the view with headers to ~/Documents/parsed_addresses.csv.
